story: Daphene and Melania were hanging out in the market. They saw a coffer and a bag. They found a casette in the coffer. Melania left the market. Daphene moved the casette to the bag.

    [Output]

    [Candidate Answers]
    A. cabinet
    B. closet

    Person A is Neila. Person B is Juanita. The item is towel. The location X is closet. The location Y is cabinet.
